contextBanner: [TBG | Stale PR Cherry-Pick | coordinator/cleanup | branch: docs/agent-skills-stale-pr-cherry-pick]
purpose: Recover selected value from stale or conflicted PRs without blind merge, blind squash, blind deletion, or stale-head base selection.
allowedScope: commit range and path ownership mapping
selective cherry-pick with -x when a commit is clean and still coherent
selective path/hunk replay when only part of a stale commit remains valid
replacement PRs based on current main or an explicit current foundation branch
closing stale PRs only after a replacement or rejection rationale is recorded
forbiddenScope: using a stale PR head as a general sprint base
blind squash of a stale stack
blind deletion of branches, worktrees, evidence, or PRs
claiming runtime proof from stale artifacts
collapsing command ACK, route start, arrival, trade delta, or visible UI proof levels
rewriting unrelated docs or source while replaying a stale delta

orderedSteps.name: map_source
requiredEvidence: gh pr diff or changed-file list

orderedSteps.name: classify_value
requiredEvidence: runtime evidence references that must be preserved but not reused as PASS

orderedSteps.name: select_base
requiredEvidence: current origin/main or explicit current foundation branch
reason stale head is not being used as a base

orderedSteps.name: replay_delta
requiredEvidence: cherry-pick -x commit list or hunk/path replay notes

orderedSteps.name: validate_current_context
requiredEvidence: skipped checks with exact later command

orderedSteps.name: supersede_or_close
requiredEvidence: replacement PR link or rejection note

requires: selected delta replayed or exact blocker recorded
replacement branch based on safe current base
validation run or skipped with exact commands
old PR not deleted/closed without recorded rationale
